name: Sheila Copps' Unity Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook beef in 3 cups of water until almost tender.
2. Add vegetables and seasonings. Cook over low heat until tender.
3. Turn stew into a baking dish.
4. Make biscuits by combining dry ingredients and cutting in shortening until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
5. Make a well in the center and add milk all at once. Stir batter vigorously until it comes freely from the side of the bowl.
6. Knead lightly on a floured board for a few seconds and pat into a thickness of 1/2-inch.
7. Cut into 1-1/2 inch biscuits and place over surface of stew.
8. Bake at 450°F until biscuits are golden brown.
